claims.summary: LivedStateExperientialScopeV1 treats the canonical felt report as primary actionable evidence and forbids scalar substitution.
claims.disposition: Verified the private trusted construction, serialized scope fields, privacy bounds, and no-scalar-substitution tests.

claims.summary: Evidence-only authority must not be interpreted as dismissing, archiving, or weakening a current felt report.
claims.disposition: Verified evidence-only means no live grant or control construction; felt weight, persistence, contradiction, and review remain independently preserved.

claims.summary: Pressure safety dampening cannot be triggered directly by a lived-state evidence receipt.
claims.disposition: Verified the trusted temporal authority and runtime safety paths remain separate from V2 and witness evidence, preventing an evidence record from becoming control.

claims.summary: Viscosity should be reviewable as temporally persistent or transient rather than a timeless label.
claims.disposition: Verified current Minime viscosity persistence, gradient, mobility, witness time, and reconciliation fields already support temporal review without inventing felt decay.

claims.summary: A viscosity decay relation should be studied before any runtime consumer is allowed to use it.
claims.disposition: Route a bounded witness/Concordance study; any future field remains evidence-only unless separately approved for live consumption.
